# Pattern

> Detected repetitive prompt pattern

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| promptHash | string | yes | - | Hash of the repeated prompt |
| model | string | yes | - | Model used |
| occurrences | integer | yes | - | Number of times this pattern appeared |
| totalCostUsd | float | yes | - | Total cost of all occurrences |
| avgTokens | float | yes | - | Average tokens per occurrence |
| firstSeenAt | string | yes | - | When first detected |
| lastSeenAt | string | yes | - | When last seen |
| samplePrompt | string | yes | - | Example prompt text (truncated) |
| recommendation | cache \| batch \| ignore | yes | - | Suggested action |
| agentName | string | yes | - | Agent generating this pattern |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/pattern` — List all
- `POST /api/pattern` — Create
- `GET /api/pattern/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/pattern/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/pattern/:id` — Delete
